excerpt: The official programme page for MSc in Carbon Neutral Cities and Urban Sustainability lists Early round opening on 2026-07-02 and closing on 2026-10-20. Source: https://www.polyu.edu.hk/study/pg/tpg/2027/33088-cfm-cpm Local Application Deadline: 20 Oct 2026 (Early Round) Non-Local Application Deadline: 20 Oct 2026 (Early Round)
matchedTextBefore: The programme has been revamped from the previous MSc in Sustainable Urban Development (可持續城市發展學理學碩士學位) programme, starting from the intake cohort of 2024/25.
matchedText: The official programme page for MSc in Carbon Neutral Cities and Urban Sustainability lists Early round opening on 2026-07-02 and closing on 2026-10-20.
